text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa participates in the summer
festival during camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the other Umamusume tire out and take a
break to rest, El Condor Pasa continues dancing
alone to entertain everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In doing so, she finally understands what Silence
Suzuka meant about El Condor Pasa possessing a
special power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her victories and performances are all for the
sake of making people happy. To that end, she'll
do her best no matter the circumstances. That's
her true power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's dream is to entertain everyone.
Together, we offer a prayer to her mask, the
symbol of her dreams.
